name: structurizr
description: Generate Structurizr C4 architecture diagrams from Confluence pages or direct descriptions. Produces validated DSL for system context, container, and deployment diagrams.
author: sanjeev.giri@vertexinc.com

plugins.name: vertex-atlassian-mcp
plugins.reason: Required for fetching Confluence page content as architecture input. The plugin degrades gracefully to direct text input if not installed.
